Nursing

Career Opportunities

MENU

The graduated nurses have the opportunity of working at public and private hospitals, institutions that provide health education and consulting services and in the areas of health of school, worker health, elderly health, health insurance, environment, tourism health and forensic medicine and medicine industry. The nurses can also continue their postgraduate studies and become academics in universities.
